race.comment: SEINDEEL (9) was just 0.7L off the winner last time out at this trip last start at Pinjarra when a beaten favourite. The inside draw should see him in a handy position in the run and the form out of his last start has worked out well. Drops 1kg today and can return to winning ways. OLD MATE HENRY (8) bounced back to form third-up when narrowly beaten at Belmont over the mile. Can build on that effort today with Pike hopping on board. He's never missed the placings when riding the gelding and a repeat of his last start will see him right in the finish. MAKIN PROPHETS (11) has won three on end and now comes to town. This is much tougher, but this is an open race and the mile is no issue. Not out of this if he can hold his form. DEFENDING (2) is racing in strong order for Nottle and the 2kg claim comes in handy. Will be hard to hold out. FIFTH ESSENCE (5) can go one better today stepping out to the mile for the first time.
